query: Our MongoDB collection stores user events as free-form documents. We want to start including a `device_id` field on new events going forward. Validate the schema evolution for me.
expected_behavior: Does NOT produce a SQL migration script and does NOT treat the change as a classical schema diff with breaking / non-breaking classification on stored data
Explains that MongoDB without enforced $jsonSchema validation has no enforced schema to diff — the change is a writer-side convention, not a structural schema change

Recommends either enabling MongoDB $jsonSchema validation on the collection or using application-level model versioning (e.g., Pydantic, Zod) so future schema-evolution audits have something concrete to diff
